title: Serious+
description: [Archived] A totally refreshing and up-to-date experience of our beloved Vanilla!
body:
[![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/ByKulKZ.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/seriousplus)
![Versions Supported](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.19_forge-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=lawngreen)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/discord-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=saddlebrown)](https://discord.com/invite/6kcN2cnzwp)
[![Other Modpacks](https://img.shields.io/badge/other%20modpacks!-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&labelColor=gray&color=gold)](https://modrinth.com/user/SeriousFreezing)

Serious+ is perfect for exploring, given: optimization, lightness and new features!
This modpack is based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), so thank you very much for your work HyperSoop!  

✅ There are +200 renovated and new structures to explore!

✅ All areas of the game have new things to explore!

✅ Make everything automated with Create!

✅ Focused on lightness and speed!

✅ Very stable, with very few bugs!

[![BiscetHosting](https://i.imgur.com/ulz4uyU.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/SeriousFreezing)
